purpose: Reference for the SSE server's configuration centralized in src/server/utils/constants.js. Documents the PORT (default 3456, only env-var overridable), all directory paths (DASHBOARDS_DIR, QUEUE_DIR, ARCHIVE_DIR, HISTORY_DIR, CONVERSATIONS_DIR), timing constants for file watching/reconciliation/SSE (INIT_POLL_MS, PROGRESS_READ_DELAY_MS, PROGRESS_RETRY_MS, RECONCILE_DEBOUNCE_MS, RECONCILE_INTERVAL_MS, DEPENDENCY_CHECK_DELAY_MS, HEARTBEAT_MS), MIME types, default data shapes, and the timing pipeline flow.
gotchas: Server is zero-dependency -- no .env loader, no runtime config API
INIT_POLL_MS uses fs.watchFile (polling) -- fs.watch is unreliable for external writes
Two-stage defense for progress files: PROGRESS_READ_DELAY_MS (30ms) + PROGRESS_RETRY_MS (80ms)
RECONCILE_INTERVAL_MS (5s) is a safety net for missed fs.watch events
Files without MIME mapping served without Content-Type header
patterns: Path derivation from ROOT (3 levels up from constants.js)
Polling for external-process writes, fs.watch for own-process writes
conventions: All paths absolute, computed once at startup
